products.title: Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra 5G (Titanium Silverblue, 12GB RAM, 512GB Storage)
products.short_description: Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra 5G with 200MP camera, Snapdragon 8 Elite processor, S Pen support, and advanced Galaxy AI features.
products.long_description: The Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra 5G is a premium flagship smartphone built for performance, photography, and productivity. It features a stunning 6.9-inch Dynamic AMOLED display with smooth 120Hz refresh rate and vibrant visuals. Powered by the Snapdragon 8 Elite processor, it delivers top-tier performance for gaming and multitasking. The 200MP quad-camera system captures professional-grade photos with exceptional detail, including ultra-wide and periscope zoom capabilities. Integrated Galaxy AI features enhance productivity with smart suggestions and real-time assistance. The device includes an S Pen for creative and professional use, along with a durable titanium design and long-lasting battery life.
cons: Charging speed slower compared to competitors
Battery drains faster under heavy usage

positive: Smooth performance and fast app loading
Useful AI features and S Pen integration
negative: Battery life inconsistent for heavy users

offers: Up to ₹4,169 cashback on select cards
